description: Style NoteIt's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient.Product DetailsWhite shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailing on the sidesPadded and meshed tongue and inner Globalite midsoleThick rubber outsole with patterned grooves and a branded lug on the heelThe shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
